params.value: SELECT OwnerId, DAY_ONLY(ActivityDateTime), COUNT(Id) FROM Event WHERE AccountId != null AND ActivityDateTime >= 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z AND ActivityDateTime <= TODAY AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000006RaC1IAK','005W7000006fJw5IAE','005W70000064mKSIAY','005W7000006fJrFIAU','0059L000000JKGSQA4','005W70000071E6XIAU') GROUP BY OwnerId, DAY_ONLY(ActivityDateTime) ORDER BY DAY_ONLY(ActivityDateTime)
